node.text:
Under the lights in Courchevel, @mikaelashiffrin takes the World Cup night slalom win.

One of her most successful stages. A benchmark she keeps raising.

Her fourth straight slalom win, extending her record as the most successful World Cup skier of all time.

#YouGotThis
#RoadToMilanoCortina2026
📷 @tchapaloute

Germany Got Game.

Proud to sponsor the German National Basketball Team.

node.text:
The Indian Women’s Cricket Team. That’s the headline.

#YouGotThis

The proof Is in the podium 👟 

The city that never sleeps just woke up to a reminder that Adizero doesn’t rest either. Four athletes, three stripes, one sweep, all driven by the same innovation built for moments like this.

New York didn’t just see a race, it saw a statement.

#Adizero #YouGotThis

Dominance down to the wire🗽

Glory shared stride for stride in New York with @bensonkipruto24 claiming his fourth world marathon major and @alexmutiso57 right behind.

📸 @nyrr  
#TCSNYCMarathon
Third time, same Kaduzs. @laurahorvaht champion in Aberdeen 🥇 Next stop, WFP. #YouGotThis #adidasTraining
Top 2 not 2 in the 6
adidas innovation and two-time Hyrox World Champion Tim Wenisch pushing the limits of fitness racing.
